Bash(cd "D:/claude/25년 주별수량" && python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('25년도 주차별 생활재 공급수량.xlsx', data_only=True\)
print\('=== 공급수량 ==='\)
print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\)
ws = wb.active
print\('Sheet name:', ws.title\)
print\('Dimensions:', ws.dimensions\)
print\('Max row:', ws.max_row, 'Max col:', ws.max_column\)
print\(\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=min\(10, ws.max_row\), values_only=False\):
    print\([cell.value for cell in row]\)
")
